title: How long does app review process take for monday.com?
excerpt: I was creating monday.com app, I just wanted to know how long does it take the app review process.

posts.author: goatopta (goat opta)
posts.cookedHtml: I was creating monday.com app, I just wanted to know how long does it take the app review process.

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @goatopta,

Welcome to the community! We hope you like it here

The time spent in review depends on your app’s readiness, according to our app requirements and guidelines.

Please see this guide for a summary of the process: Submit to the app marketplace

Also, be sure to check out our Review Checklist: First Review

Once you’ve gathered the requirements, please submit your application using this form: https://forms.monday.com/forms/96abe3d41fa02cf8b4c8128f28432869?r=use1

Good luck! and feel free to reach out to us if you have any questions.

We look forward to seeing your app
